name: Siltwatch Company
specialty: A versatile team known for their ability to navigate the ever-shifting rifts, providing access to otherwise inaccessible locations and resources.

members.name: Eira Thornwhisper
members.note: Her eyes glow a eerie green in low light, a remnant of her past as a rift-walker.

members.name: Varnus Stonefist
members.note: His battle scars tell tales of battles fought within the rifts, some still bleeding when they first appear.

members.name: Jynx Siltwhisper
members.note: Despite her felineness, she has a sharp, almost reptilian grace that makes her stand out in the crowd.

visual: Dressed in leather and steel, they move with a practiced ease, their gear adorned with intricate patterns and glowing runes. Their distinctive mark, a stylized watchtower, is tattooed on their forearms.
reputation_note: Whispers speak of their uncanny ability to navigate the rifts, while some warn that they're too close to the dangerous forces that lie beneath.
